sentiment: Every node in the network carries a small piece of the whole; none of us builds alone.

stories.title: Mesh LLM: distributed AI computing on iroh
stories.summary: A new system distributes AI inference across a peer mesh network, letting everyday devices contribute computing power to language models.

stories.title: Vint Cerf, a 'father of the Internet', is retiring
stories.summary: Vint Cerf, co-designer of TCP/IP and one of the architects of the modern Internet, is stepping down after decades of foundational work.

stories.title: Show HN: Mindwalk – Replay coding-agent sessions on a 3D map of your codebase
stories.summary: Mindwalk visualizes coding-agent sessions as navigable 3D maps, letting developers replay and understand how AI explored their codebase.
